requirement_topic.zh: GB/T 20234 连接器与 IEC 62196 接口
requirement_topic.zht: GB/T 20234 連接器與 IEC 62196 介面

summary.en: Where a Senegal project specifies IEC connector interfaces, AC and DC charger hardware should be checked against IEC 62196. IEC 62196-2:2025 covers AC pin-and-contact-tube accessories, while IEC 62196-3:2022 covers DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers. Connector choice can also be driven by the imported vehicle fleet, tender requirements, site-owner requirements, and interoperability expectations.
summary.zh: 若塞内加尔项目指定 IEC 连接器接口，交流和直流充电设备硬件应按 IEC 62196 核查。IEC 62196-2:2025 涵盖交流针脚和套管附件，IEC 62196-3:2022 涵盖直流及交直流车辆耦合器。连接器选择还可能由进口车辆车队、招标要求、场站业主要求和互操作性预期决定。
summary.zht: 若塞內加爾項目指定 IEC 連接器介面，交流和直流充電設備硬體應按 IEC 62196 核查。IEC 62196-2:2025 涵蓋交流針腳和套管附件，IEC 62196-3:2022 涵蓋直流及交直流車輛耦合器。連接器選擇還可能由進口車輛車隊、招標要求、場站業主要求和互操作性預期決定。

standards_or_laws: Project fleet and tender connector specification

summary.en: China-market EV chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 for AC connectors and GB/T 20234.3 for DC connectors, with GB/T 20234.1 general requirements. GB/T connector geometry, pin gender, signaling, and DC communication assumptions can differ from IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS-style export configurations, so China hardware is not automatically plug-compatible.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常采用 GB/T 20234.2 交流接口和 GB/T 20234.3 直流接口，并以 GB/T 20234.1 作为通用要求。GB/T 连接器几何、公母端、信号和直流通信假设可能不同于 IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS 类出口配置，因此中国硬件不会自动插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常採用 GB/T 20234.2 交流介面和 GB/T 20234.3 直流介面，並以 GB/T 20234.1 作為通用要求。GB/T 連接器幾何、公母端、信號和直流通信假設可能不同於 IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS 類出口配置，因此中國硬體不會自動插接相容。

gap.en: Confirm connector drawings, vehicle inlet assumptions, cable ratings, locking, touch protection, pilot/proximity circuits, DC communication route, label language, and spare-part strategy before shipment. A connector adapter is not a compliance substitute unless the target route explicitly accepts it.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认连接器图纸、车辆插座假设、电缆额定值、锁止、防触电、控制导引/接近导引电路、直流通信路径、标签语言和备件策略。除非目标路径明确接受，转接头不能替代合规。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認連接器圖紙、車輛插座假設、電纜額定值、鎖止、防觸電、控制導引／接近導引電路、直流通信路徑、標籤語言和備件策略。除非目標路徑明確接受，轉接頭不能替代合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Senegal project, tender, fleet, ASN-adopted standard, customs route, or site owner requires IEC 62196 or a specified connector interface; otherwise project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 connector evidence is relevant for China-market configuration but does not prove IEC 62196 plug compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector mismatch is a high-risk China-to-Senegal gap. Verify the vehicle fleet and IEC 62196 route before promising GB/T hardware compatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 连接器不匹配是中国至塞内加尔项目的高风险差距。承诺 GB/T 硬件兼容前，应核实车辆车队和 IEC 62196 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 連接器不匹配是中國至塞內加爾項目的高風險差距。承諾 GB/T 硬體相容前，應核實車輛車隊和 IEC 62196 路徑。
